---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible defect
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
---

## Description

Describe the defect and its impact.

## Reproduction

List minimal, repeatable steps and inputs.

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior

What happened instead?

## Environment

Include version, deployment context, operating system, and relevant configuration names without secret values.

## Logs

Attach the smallest useful excerpt. **Remove API keys, tokens, wallet data, personal data, and all other secrets before posting.**

## Severity

State the operational, security, data, or financial-safety impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched for an existing report.
- [ ] I provided reproducible evidence where possible.
- [ ] I removed secrets and sensitive data.
- [ ] This is not a vulnerability disclosure; security issues are reported privately.
